seoTitle: Digby vs Diggers Rest — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Digby and Diggers Rest. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Digby vs Diggers Rest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Digby and Diggers Rest.
heading: Digby vs Diggers Rest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Digby, Victoria and Diggers Rest, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Digby has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Diggers Rest (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Digby or Diggers Rest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Digby has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Diggers Rest scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Digby scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Diggers Rest scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Digby or Diggers Rest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Digby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
